global_description: Rectangular electronic device with a flat surface, featuring a grid of keys. Typically black or white, made of plastic, with a matte or glossy finish. Keys are square or rectangular, with printed letters, numbers, and symbols. Some models include additional function keys and a numeric keypad.

part_details.keys: Square or rectangular, with printed letters, numbers, and symbols
part_details.body: Rectangular, typically black or white plastic

spatial_relations: Keys arranged in a grid on the surface
Function keys positioned above main keys
Numeric keypad on the right side
